codeReview.summary: The fix correctly addresses the prior blocking defect in lead-age distribution: the 60+d bucket no longer uses Infinity arithmetic and now counts stale leads via an explicit 61+ day cutoff branch. Analytics.tsx now consumes the extracted utility, and deterministic tests (including boundary cases at 60/61 days) provide direct evidence that VAL-EXPAND-008 behavior is restored while funnel and time-to-contact surfaces remain intact.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission guidance and feature expectations are slightly out of sync for frontend verification: mission AGENTS says there is no frontend test framework, while this fix requires deterministic analytics-value verification and was implemented with vitest.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md (TypeScript/React section) states 'No frontend test framework — verification via npm run build + agent-browser'; fix commit 85eaf5c adds vitest.config.ts, package.json test scripts/devDependencies, and src/utils/ageDistribution.test.ts for deterministic checks.

summary: Pass: the re-run fix resolves the original 60+d stale-bucket failure from conversion-funnel-analytics and adds deterministic evidence for bucket math, including the previously broken stale path.
